title: recoverr: A Python package for estimating within-person recovery dynamics from behavioral telemetry
description: Open-source Python pipeline for estimating within-person recovery dynamics after failure from behavioral telemetry (learning, memory, performance): event detection, context-matched placebo baselines, parametric (decay time-constant) and nonparametric (area index) recovery estimation, split-half and multilevel reliability, permutation nulls, and held-out validation.

creators.name: Jeong, Hongwon
creators.affiliation: Center for Creative Convergence Education, Hanyang University ERICA
